name: HowTo-Genie v4.0 — Voice & Audio Content Pipeline

nodes.name: 🎙️ Audio Pipeline Trigger (4PM Daily)
nodes.notes: Runs after translation pipeline completes. Creates audio for all 9 language versions.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Load Config
nodes.notes: Runs core/01_Config_Loader.json. Downstream nodes use $('⚙️ Load Config').item.json.

nodes.name: 🌍 Get All Language Versions
nodes.notes: Fetches today's post in all 9 languages (EN + 8 translations). Uses MULTILINGUAL_CONTENT_TAB from config.

nodes.name: 🌐 Local TTS: Generate Audio
nodes.notes: POST to local TTS server (Piper etc). URL from TTS_SERVER_URL. Response = binary audio.

nodes.name: 🎤 ElevenLabs: Generate Audio
nodes.notes: Uses n8n credential 'ElevenLabs API' (Header Auth, name=xi-api-key). 29 languages.

nodes.name: 🗣️ Google TTS: Generate Audio
nodes.notes: Uses n8n credential 'Google Cloud TTS' (Google API key). Free tier: 1M chars/month.

nodes.name: 📁 Write audio to path
nodes.notes: Writes binary to AUDIO_OUTPUT_PATH. Requires writable path; uses Node fs in self-hosted n8n.

nodes.name: 📋 Read Audio Log
nodes.notes: Read once per run for idempotency. Uses GOOGLE_SHEET_ID and AUDIO_LOG_TAB.

nodes.name: 🔒 Idempotency filter
nodes.notes: Skips append if row with same post+date+language already in AUDIO_LOG_TAB.
